fixesApplied.summary: Made default and mock-state screenshots viewport-qualified; updated the default no-mock assertion to verify the public browse branch that now renders by default.
Made CRUD screenshots viewport-qualified; drove the platform-admin role, expanded the platform-only raw-index panel before CRUD assertions, and waited for mobile list/empty state rendering.
Made FLOW-32 C6 role coverage screenshots viewport-qualified for anonymous and freelancer branches.

verification.name: FLOW-32 CRUD and mock-state Playwright matrix
verification.command: Push-Location client; $env:VITE_PORT='5175'; npx playwright test e2e/sharable-flows-marketplace-mock-states.spec.ts e2e/sharable-flows-marketplace-crud.spec.ts --workers=1 --timeout=60000 --reporter=line; Pop-Location

verification.name: FLOW-32 C6 role coverage Playwright matrix
verification.command: Push-Location client; $env:VITE_PORT='5175'; npx playwright test e2e/c6-role-coverage-runs-22-44.spec.ts -g "C6-R32" --workers=1 --timeout=60000 --reporter=line; Pop-Location

pngMatrix.note: FLOW-32 matrix covers default public browse, 8 mock states, and 4 CRUD screenshots across desktop, tablet, and mobile, plus anonymous and freelancer C6 role branches across the same 3 viewports.

knownNonBlockingTypecheckDrift.command: Push-Location client; npx tsc --noEmit -p e2e/tsconfig.json; Pop-Location
